column31: Quick reload is 0.80s long. It triggers when you have emptied a magazine, and when you have a "quick magazine" available (indicated by the bars near your ammo count). Otherwise, a normal reload will occur.
Cannot hit multiple targets in one stab.  Has an 800ms wind-up time.
Cannot hit multiple targets in one stab.  Has an 800ms wind-up time. Backstab angle is 150 degrees.

Takes ~160ms to fire the 1st shot. Various methods of optimizing TTK: https://i.imgur.com/DLfa7hv.jpeg (qm = quick melee). TTK does not account for projectile travel time. Rate of fire overall is 103 RPM. Minimum draw time is 0.08s.

Takes ~640ms to charge a shot. Various methods of optimizing TTK: https://i.imgur.com/DLfa7hv.jpeg (qm = quick melee). TTK does not account for projectile travel time.  Damage increases from 60 to 124 (continuously) based on how long this weapon was charged.

Bullets are hitscan up until 40m, and then converted into projectiles afterwards. Air drag on the projectile is 0.08. Initial projectile velocity is 240 m/s. Gravity multiplier on the projectile is 0.55.
Can hit multiple targets in a single lunge.
TTK does not account for projectile travel time, or the initial delay when throwing the knives.  It represents more of a "time-to-death" calculation, if anything.
